messages.content: Anxiety is a mental health issue which is described as fear and worry about future. Anxiety can be classified in different categories like social anxiety, specific (or idiosyncratic) anxiety and generalised anxiety disorder. Anxiety disorders affect more than 25% of population at some point in their life.
it is normal to have anxiety?
yes, normalcy is a situation where someone has minimal anxiety.
